sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9451" key="a)ntanatre/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντανα-τρέχω</orth>, <sense id="n9451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">return,</tr_> of the foreskin, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
